search_candidates.query: INDO Royalindo Investa Wijaya Tbk. website resmi investor relation annual report pdf
search_candidates.title: Investor Relations - LISTRINDO
search_candidates.content: Since its operation in 1993, Cikarang Listrindo has positioned itself as a reliable partner for the 5 (five) major industrial areas of Jababeka Industrial Estate, MM-2100, East Jakarta Industrial Park, Hyundai Inti Development, and Lippo Cikarang, along with various industries operating within those areas. Cikarang Listrindo is the first private power company listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange with consistent returns to Shareholders. Cikarang Listrindo managed to maintain a strong credit rating enabling the Company to make interest and dividend payment to the bondholders and shareholders annually. In 2025, the Company’s credit rating improved to BBB- from S&P and Baa3 from Moody’s, making PT Cikarang Listrindo Tbk ranked as an Investment Grade company for the first time. The Company supplies electricity to 5 (five) leading industrial estates, which as an integrated area, is one of the largest and most developed industrial estate in Indonesia. Supported by the rapidly increasing infrastructure development around the industrial estates and access to significant unutilized land for capacity expansion, the Company is enabled to develop in line with the growth of industrial areas.

search_candidates.title: Investor relations - Ashmore Group
search_candidates.content: ## Main navigation. ###### The “no war, no peace, no oil” status lives on. ## Tentang Ashmore Indonesia. PT Ashmore Asset Management Indonesia Tbk currently operates as an investment manager focusing on three main investment products: stocks, bonds - both local (Rupiah) denominated and denominated in other foreign currencies- and money market. The Company has so far established a strong track record of superior fund performance since its inception. PT Ashmore  Asset Management Indonesia Tbk is an Indonesia Stock Exchange listed company. Registered office and company details:.
